zh.All Saints Churchyard, Holme-on-Spalding: 英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Spalding於大約1445年出生在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾時，她的父親Richard de Spalding21歲，母親Catherine Wylly21歲。她於1462年與William Sothern在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1509年在她的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Spalding于大约1445年出生在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾时，她的父亲Richard de Spalding21岁，母亲Catherine Wylly21岁。她于1462年与William Sothern在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1509年在她的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国越可爾霍爾--斯帕爾丁-姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Spalding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Angus): variant of   Spaulding  .

History: The surname was taken to Scotland in the 13th century by Radulphus de Spalding. His descendants prospered, and the name is still common in Scotland. Early American Spaldings include Thomas Spalding, born in Frederica, GA, in 1774, who introduced sea-island cotton in GA, and the physician Lyman Spalding, born in Cornish, NH, in 1775, who founded US Pharmacopoeia.

variants.name: Spaulding
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Cambridgeshire and Norfolk): habitational name from Spalding (Lincolnshire), from Old English Spaldas, the name of an Anglian tribe who settled chiefly in the fen-lands of Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire, + the groupname suffix -ingas. Compare Spafford .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Spalding was born about 1445, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard de Spalding, was 21 and her mother, Catherine Wylly, was 21. She married William Sothern in 1462, in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1509, in her hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Spalding est née environ 1445, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Spalding, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Catherine Wylly, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William Sothern en 1462, à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Spalding Moor, Yorkshire, England: Low Moor, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Spalding um 1445 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Spalding 21 und ihre Mutter Catherine Wylly 21. Sie hat 1462 in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England William Sothern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1509 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Spaldingが約1445年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルで生まれた時，父Richard de Spaldingは21歳，母Catherine Wyllyは21歳であった。1462年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルでWilliam Sothernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1509年に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアホールメ-オン-スプアルディング-モオルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Spalding(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Spalding(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Wylly(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1462년 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에서 William Sothern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1509년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 홀--스팔딩-모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Spalding nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Spalding, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Wylly, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sothern em 1462, em Holme-on-Spalding-Moor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. ro.Spalding Moor, Yorkshire, England: Low Moor, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Spalding родилась около 1445 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Spalding было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Catherine Wylly, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sothern в 1462 г. в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1509 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности холме-он-спалдинг-мур, еркшир, Англия.
